description_long: This object is a stuffed toy modeled after a pig, featuring a pale pink body with slightly darker pink accents on the ears and snout. The toy has four legs, a curled tail, and prominent, floppy ears. Its surface is soft and matte, with visible seams and some handwritten markings or signatures on its body, suggesting it may have been used for educational or commemorative purposes. The facial features are subtle, with small, dark eyes and a gentle, neutral expression. The overall shape is lifelike, with a rounded belly and naturalistic limb positioning. The toy appears well-worn, with some creases and minor surface imperfections.
description: A pale pink stuffed pig toy with floppy ears, subtle facial features, and handwritten markings on its body. The surface is soft and matte, with a lifelike, rounded shape.
description_view_0: The left side of the pig is visible, showing the rounded belly, curled tail, and several handwritten markings on the body.
description_view_1: The front of the pig is visible, highlighting the snout, both floppy ears, and the subtle facial features.
description_view_2: The rear and right side of the pig are visible, with the tail and back legs prominent, and some surface creases apparent.
description_view_3: The right side of the pig is visible, showing more handwritten markings and the natural curve of the body and limbs.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with small, dark eyes and a relaxed mouth, giving the toy a calm and gentle appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: The toy is lying on its side with all four legs slightly bent and the head turned gently to one side.
